diagrams.title: String Memory Layout in C
diagrams.description: Shows how a string is stored in memory as a character array with null terminator
diagrams.purpose: Understand that strings are character arrays ending with null character

diagrams.title: strcpy Operation Visualization
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how strcpy() copies one string to another
elements: Destination array: initially empty, then filled
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the copying mechanism of strcpy function

diagrams.title: strcat Operation Visualization
diagrams.description: Shows how concatenation works by appending one string to another
elements: Copies string 2 starting from null position

diagrams.title: 2D Array of Strings
diagrams.description: Visual representation of a 2D character array storing multiple strings
diagrams.purpose: Understand how multiple strings are stored in a 2D array
